title: XPeng Stock Drops 7.9% on Lower November Deliveries
text: XPeng Inc. (NYSE:XPEV) experienced a significant market decline following disappointing delivery numbers. The electric vehicle manufacturer delivered 36,728 smart electric vehicles in November, 12.6 percent lower than the 42,013 vehicles delivered in October. Despite this monthly decline, the firm maintained year-over-year growth, representing 19 percent gains compared to the same month in the prior year. Through the first eleven months of 2025, XPeng demonstrated substantial expansion, delivering nearly 392,000 units, a significant jump from the previous year's pace. International sales contributed meaningfully, with overseas operations generating substantial volume. The stock's 7.92% drop to $19.66 per share reflected broader market disappointment with the sequential decline despite encouraging year-over-year comparisons. Investors anticipated company announcements regarding technological developments in autonomous vehicle systems.
